plan.title: Choose your plan
plan.compareDescription: Every plan gets all core features. Starter and Pro add higher usage with monthly resets and pay-as-you-go overages.

description.monthly: Billed monthly. Includes 150 voice minutes that reset monthly.

description.monthly: Billed monthly. More included usage for growing call volume.
